command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
python3 << HEREDOC

import pathlib, subprocess, ast

# Write moreno-mailbox directly on vm-memory
mailbox_source = """#!/usr/bin/env python3
\"\"\"
moreno-mailbox v1.0.0 -- Moreno AI Ecosystem Internal Communications Mailbox
\"\"\"
from __future__ import annotations
import argparse, base64, json, sqlite3, sys, uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

VERSION = \"1.0.0\"
HOME = Path.home()
STATE_ROOT = HOME / \".local\" / \"state\" / \"moreno-mailbox\"
DB_PATH = STATE_ROOT / \"mailbox.sqlite3\"

PARTICIPANTS = {
    \"sakura\":   {\"vm\": \"vm-hermes\",    \"ip\": \"192.168.0.202\"},
    \"remy\":     {\"vm\": \"vm-openclaw\",  \"ip\": \"192.168.0.199\"},
    \"megabyte\": {\"vm\": \"vm-ecosystem\", \"ip\": \"192.168.0.203\"},
    \"larry\":    {\"vm\": \"vm-ecosystem\", \"ip\": \"192.168.0.203\"},
    \"sentinel\": {\"vm\": \"vm-claude-hub\",\"ip\": \"192.168.0.191\"},
    \"claude\":   {\"vm\": None,            \"ip\": None},
    \"chatgpt\":  {\"vm\": None,            \"ip\": None},
    \"jose\":     {\"vm\": None,            \"ip\": None},
}

ROUTE_POLICY = {
    \"sakura\":   [\"nats\", \"n8n_webhook\", \"pending\"],
    \"remy\":     [\"nats\", \"n8n_webhook\", \"pending\"],
    \"megabyte\": [\"nats\", \"n8n_webhook\", \"pending\"],
    \"larry\":    [\"nats\", \"n8n_webhook\", \"pending\"],
    \"sentinel\": [\"nats\", \"n8n_webhook\", \"pending\"],
    \"claude\":   [\"github_bridge\", \"gmail_claude_exchange\", \"pending\"],
    \"chatgpt\":  [\"n8n_webhook\", \"gmail_bus\", \"pending\"],
    \"jose\":     [\"pending\"],
}

def utc_now():
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()

def get_conn():
    STATE_ROOT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    conn = sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH))
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    return conn

def init_db():
    conn = get_conn()
    conn.executescript(\"\"\"
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS messages (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            envelope_json TEXT NOT NULL,
            to_participant TEXT NOT NULL,
            to_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'agent',
            status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
            originating_transport TEXT,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            delivered_at TEXT,
            acked_at TEXT,
            retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            last_error TEXT,
            expiration_at TEXT
        );
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS participants (
            name TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            vm TEXT, ip TEXT,
            route_policy_json TEXT,
            status TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown',
            last_seen_at TEXT,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL
        );
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS delivery_log (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            message_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            attempt_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            transport TEXT NOT NULL,
            result TEXT NOT NULL,
            detail TEXT
        );
        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_to ON messages(to_participant, status);
    \"\"\")
    now = utc_now()
    for name, info in PARTICIPANTS.items():
        conn.execute(\"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO participants (name,vm,ip,route_policy_json,status,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)\",
            (name, info.get(\"vm\"), info.get(\"ip\"), json.dumps(ROUTE_POLICY.get(name,[\"pending\"])), \"unknown\", now))
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    print(json.dumps({\"ok\": True, \"version\": VERSION, \"db\": str(DB_PATH)}))

def store_message(b64):
    env = json.loads(base64.b64decode(b64).decode(\"utf-8\"))
    mid = env.get(\"message_id\") or str(uuid.uuid4())
    env[\"message_id\"] = mid
    to = env.get(\"to\", {})
    to_type = to.get(\"type\", \"agent\")
    to_name = to.get(\"name\", \"\" ) if to_type == \"agent\" else to_type
    conn = get_conn()
    conn.execute(\"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO messages (id,envelope_json,to_participant,to_type,status,originating_transport,created_at,expiration_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)\",
        (mid, json.dumps(env), to_name, to_type, \"pending\", env.get(\"originating_transport\"), utc_now(), env.get(\"expiration_at\")))
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    print(json.dumps({\"ok\": True, \"message_id\": mid, \"to\": to_name, \"status\": \"pending\"}))

def deliver(participant, limit):
    conn = get_conn()
    rows = conn.execute(\"SELECT id,envelope_json,to_participant,status,created_at,retry_count FROM messages WHERE to_participant=? AND status IN ('pending','failed') AND (expiration_at IS NULL OR expiration_at>?) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT ?\",
        (participant, utc_now(), limit)).fetchall()
    conn.close()
    msgs = [{\"message_id\":r[\"id\"],\"to\":r[\"to_participant\"],\"status\":r[\"status\"],\"created_at\":r[\"created_at\"],\"retry_count\":r[\"retry_count\"]} for r in rows]
    print(json.dumps({\"ok\": True, \"participant\": participant, \"pending\": msgs, \"count\": len(msgs)}))

def ack(mid):
    conn = get_conn()
    conn.execute(\"UPDATE messages SET status='acked', acked_at=? WHERE id=?\", (utc_now(), mid))
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    print(json.dumps({\"ok\": True, \"message_id\": mid, \"status\": \"acked\"}))

def status(participant):
    conn = get_conn()
    if participant:
        rows = conn.execute(\"SELECT status, COUNT(*) cnt FROM messages WHERE to_participant=? GROUP BY status\", (participant,)).fetchall()
        print(json.dumps({\"ok\": True, \"participant\": participant, \"counts\": {r[\"status\"]:r[\"cnt\"] for r in rows}}))
    else:
        rows = conn.execute(\"SELECT to_participant, status, COUNT(*) cnt FROM messages GROUP BY to_participant, status\").fetchall()
        s = {}
        for r in rows:
            s.setdefault(r[\"to_participant\"], {})[r[\"status\"]] = r[\"cnt\"]
        print(json.dumps({\"ok\": True, \"summary\": s}))
    conn.close()

def main():
    p = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    sub = p.add_subparsers(dest=\"cmd\")
    sub.add_parser(\"init\")
    ps = sub.add_parser(\"store\"); ps.add_argument(\"--envelope-b64\", required=True)
    pd = sub.add_parser(\"deliver\"); pd.add_argument(\"--to\", required=True); pd.add_argument(\"--limit\",type=int,default=10)
    pst = sub.add_parser(\"status\"); pst.add_argument(\"--participant\", default=None)
    pa = sub.add_parser(\"ack\"); pa.add_argument(\"--message-id\", required=True)
    args = p.parse_args()
    if args.cmd == \"init\": init_db()
    elif args.cmd == \"store\": init_db(); store_message(args.envelope_b64)
    elif args.cmd == \"deliver\": deliver(args.to, args.limit)
    elif args.cmd == \"status\": status(getattr(args,\"participant\",None))
    elif args.cmd == \"ack\": ack(args.message_id)
    else: p.print_help()

if __name__ == \"__main__\": main()
"""

# Write binary
bin_path = pathlib.Path("/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-mailbox")
bin_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
bin_path.write_text(mailbox_source)
bin_path.chmod(0o755)

# Syntax check
try:
    ast.parse(bin_path.read_text())
    print("SYNTAX_OK")
except SyntaxError as e:
    print(f"SYNTAX_ERROR: {e}")
    import sys; sys.exit(1)

# Test init
r = subprocess.run([str(bin_path), "init"], capture_output=True, text=True)
print("INIT:", r.stdout.strip()[:100] or r.stderr.strip()[:80])

# Verify DB exists
import os
db = pathlib.Path("/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-mailbox/mailbox.sqlite3")
print(f"DB_EXISTS: {db.exists()} SIZE: {db.stat().st_size if db.exists() else 0}")

HEREDOC
' 2>&1
echo DONE_2009
